disabledReason: MARKETING_AGENT_MODE must be controlled_create. MARKETING_AGENT_ENABLE_WRITES must be true. MARKETING_AGENT_GTM_CREATE_ENABLED must be true. CLI flag --platform gtm is required. CLI flag --confirm-human-approval is required. CLI flag --all or at least one --action-id is required.
mutationStatement: No GTM mutations were performed. GTM controlled create was not executed.
